title: RPL Diagnostics
summary: Demo notebook for the Within-Treebank Distribution Diagnostics experiment. Demonstrates core RPL (Random Projective Linearization) computation functions on synthetic dependency trees, loads pre-computed results for 30 UD treebanks (56 examples across 4 datasets), and produces 4 publication-quality visualizations: forest plot, pervasiveness barplot, word-order boxplot, and case-marking scatter. Uses mini_demo_data.json with curated subset of diagnostics, subtype analyses, aggregate summary, and per-sentence details.
